headline: Ralph's autonomous burndown loop shipped a fast run of fleet-hardening work on top of the design-system drop (#42): the launch gate is now armed (SITE_LIVE backported to all 4 previously-unprotected apps #50, the acceptance realData check runs automatically on production builds #78, root `pnpm test` wired into CI #51), a bugfix batch landed (duplicate sectionOrder ids + weak phone validation #89, unreadable junk-removal hero contrast #79, the 3 preview apps' latent gallery/sectionOrder bug #52, scaffold perf defaults #81), new user-facing surface shipped (branded /thanks page + default form redirect #80, machine-parseable JSON-LD hours + robots.txt + OG completeness #83, a11y baseline — focus ring, skip link, reduced-motion hero video #82, Lighthouse ≥95 + axe=100 CI budgets #88), the visual-regression fleet-drift tripwire re-landed on current main (#74, supersedes stale PR #3), vitest coverage was added for the schema contract (#53) and new-client/eject-client tooling (#54), and leadToConfig() — the deterministic lead→ClientConfig mapper behind the ops create-site button — merged (#122, first slice of #121). 2026-07-12: the loop halted idle (a spurious failed attempt on #86 — the model's deliberate blocked-stop was counted as a failure — plus label events swallowed by the concurrency dedup, with no cron watchdog to recover); restarted by hand, and the fix is staged: hirobius/ralph branch claude/idle-restart-watchdog (schedule-event chain hop + deliberate-stop reconcile) + hourly-watchdog caller on branch claude/ralph-queue-restart-0bnlj8 here. All 7 apps build clean. Engine still frozen pending ops cutover (#10). Pre-revenue — no paying client yet.
next: Land the Ralph idle-watchdog: merge hirobius/ralph claude/idle-restart-watchdog to main, retag v1, then merge claude/ralph-queue-restart-0bnlj8 here (order matters — the kit-drift gate compares against ralph main); replicate the caller cron in ops + hds
Work the open needs-human backlog: trust/conversion fields (#87), per-vertical content packs (#85), analytics/conversion events (#84), aesthetics dials (#86)
Set real form.accessKey (Web3Forms) + hcaptchaSiteKey before any prospect outreach
Delete the frozen packages/agent engine once ops's first live generate passes (#10)
blocked: Autonomous site generation blocked on ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (in ops)
Engine delete (#10) waits on ops's first live generate
#84/#85/#87/#35/#41/#27 need a human decision before Ralph can pick them up
